Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPLOGIN ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform Login Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; NOW^%DTC 10000 ; $$FMTHL7^XLFDT 10103 ; $$NOW^XLFDT 10103 ; $$UP^XLFSTR 10104 ; $$GET^XUESSO1 4342 ; $$PUT^XUESSO1 4342 ; ESSO^XUESSO4 6295 ; SETUP^XUSRB 4054 ; VALIDAV^XUSRB 4054 ; $$DECRYP^XUSRB1 2241 ; $$ENCRYP^XUSRB1 2240 ; USERINFO^XUSRB2 4055 Q ; ;--------- Private Methods used only by DIGITAL HEALTH PLATFORM ---------- ; LOGIN(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Wrapper for mulitple authentication modes login N DVPAV,DVPLERR,DVPUSER,DVPSYSL,DVPUSR,DVPACC,DVPVER,DVPDIV,DVPIP N DVPBSEU,DVPDATA,DVPOS,PARAMS I '$$AUTH^DVPUTL() D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"Not an authorized calling Application","$$LOGIN^DVPLOGIN") F X="DVPACC","DVPVER","DVPDIV","DVPIP","DVPBSEU","DVPESSO" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) ; Encrypt the A/V code ';'-delimited string before anything else I DVPACC]"" D . ; CCOW Login Support . I $E(DVPACC,1,2)="~2" S DVPAV=DVPACC Q . S DVPAV=$$ENCRYP^XUSRB1($S(DVPVER]"":$G(DVPACC)_";"_$G(DVPVER),1:$G(DVPACC))_";"_DVPIP) K DVPVER,DVPACC,XWBTIP S DVPLERR=0 ; -- Initial System Setup for logon D INIT,SETUP^XUSRB(.DVPSYSL,"",1,"") ; ; -- BSE Login I $G(DVPBSEU)]"" D Q:DVPLERR $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . I '$$PUT^XUESSO1($$DECRYP^XUSRB1(DVPBSEU)) D Q . . S PARAMS(1)="Unable to create remote Visitor user" . . D ERROR^DVPERR(182305,"DVPLOGIN - BSE Logon",.PARAMS,"") . . S DVPLERR=1 . ; BSE LITE Implementation specific for DVP . S DUZ("AUTHENTICATION")="BSELITE" . S DUZ("LOA")=2 ; ; -- Validate Access/Verify codes for login I $G(DVPAV)]"" D Q:DVPLERR $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D VALIDAV^XUSRB(.DVPUSER,DVPAV) . I 'DVPUSER(0) D Q . . S PARAMS(1)=DVPUSER(3) . . D ERROR^DVPERR(182305,"DVPLOGIN - A/V Logon",.PARAMS,"") . . S DVPLERR=1 . S @TARGET@("results","GREETING")=$G(DVPUSER(7)) ; ; -- Validate ESSO User from SAML Token I $D(@SOURCE@("DVPESSO",1)) D Q:DVPLERR . D ESSO^XUESSO4(.DVPUSER,$NA(@SOURCE@("DVPESSO"))) . I 'DVPUSER(0) D Q . . S PARAMS(1)=DVPUSER(3) . . D ERROR^DVPERR(182305,"DVPLOGIN - ESSO Logon",.PARAMS,"") . . S DVPLERR=1 . S @TARGET@("results","GREETING")=$G(DVPUSER(7)) ; ; -- DUZ not defined so unable to Logon with input credentials I $G(DUZ)<1 D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . S PARAMS(1)="No supported logon credentials identified. Unable to logon user." . D ERROR^DVPERR(182305,"DVPLOGIN - Logon",.PARAMS,"") ; ; -- Get user info D USERINFO^XUSRB2(.DVPUSR) ; ; Build the Encrypted BSE Visitor User for remote visitor access I DVPBSEU']"" S DVPBSEU=$$ENCRYP^XUSRB1($$GET^XUESSO1(.DUZ)) ; ; Build return data S @TARGET@("results","DT")=DT S @TARGET@("results","SIGNON-DATETIME")=$$FMTHL7^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT()) S @TARGET@("results","DVPBSEU")=$G(DVPBSEU) S @TARGET@("results","DUZ")=DUZ S @TARGET@("results","USER-NAME")=$G(DVPUSR(1)) S @TARGET@("results","USER-DISPLAY-NAME")=$G(DVPUSR(2)) S @TARGET@("results","USER-LOGGED-ON-DIVISION")=$G(DVPUSR(3)) S @TARGET@("results","USER-TITLE")=$G(DVPUSR(4)) S @TARGET@("results","USER-SERVICE-SECTION")=$G(DVPUSR(5)) S @TARGET@("results","USER-LANGUAGE")=$G(DVPUSR(6)) S @TARGET@("results","USER-READ-TIMEOUT")=$G(DVPUSR(7)) S @TARGET@("results","USER-VPID")=$G(DVPUSR(8)) S @TARGET@("results","USER-IP")=$G(DVPIP) M @TARGET@("results","DUZARRAY")=DUZ ;S @TARGET@("results","DVP-SESSION-TOKEN")=DVPSYMID Q ; INIT ; -- DVP-specific or general partition setup before reauthentication process starts K DVPSYS ; L S:$D(IO)[0 IO=$I S IO(0)=IO S:$G(DVPIP)]"" (IO("ZIO"),IO("IP"))=DVPIP K ^UTILITY($J),^TMP($J) K ^XUTL("XQ",$J) D NOW^%DTC S DT=X Q
